text:
Sakisuke Njiji (サキスケ＝ンジジ, Sakisuke Njiji) is a Greed Island player. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 126 

Appearance

Sakisuke has a mullet, a snub nose, and beady eyes. He wears a fur-trimmed vest and a collar-like necklace. 

Personality

Not much is known about Sakisuke's personality, but Goreinu thinks that he is very greedy. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 158 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Sakisuke was hired by Battera on the same day as Gon, Killua, and Biscuit. He, Zenju, and Puhat are astonished after Gon enters the game. Goreinu rates him quite highly in terms of combat ability, but says that he can be quite greedy. When Gon checks his binder to see who is still active in the game, Sakisuke is shown to be still alive. 

Abilities & Powers

Goreinu believes Sakisuke to be skilled in combat, although not more than himself. 

Nen

Due to being able to access Greed Island, Sakisuke is capable of utilizing Nen, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 and it can be assumed that he is moderately skilled at it since he was approved by Tsezguerra. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

In the 2011 anime adaptation, Sakisuke has dark skin. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 60 (2011)
